body.visualDesc: Low angle from just behind the pale-cream egg in its golden straw nest, looking up at all three chicks side by side. Pip (cream-white, straw farmer hat, red bandana) gasps with surprised delight, pointing at the egg. Bo (tan sandy-brown chick) hops excitedly - CRITICAL: Bo MUST WEAR her round thin wire-framed eyeglasses on her beak AND her green neck scarf, both clearly visible. Mo (blue-grey, red knitted scarf, tall red comb) nods with a gentle smile. The eggshell is CLOSED with exactly ONE thin hairline crack and a soft warm glow through that crack only - NOT open, NOT split. Afternoon light warms the porch.
